synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0421 Important: Oracle Linux 8 libsoup security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0421

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0421.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libsoup-2.62.3-11.el8_10.i686.rpm
libsoup-2.62.3-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.62.3-11.el8_10.i686.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.62.3-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libsoup-2.62.3-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.62.3-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/libsoup-2.62.3-11.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-14523




Description of changes:

[2.62.3-11]
- Backport patch for CVE-2025-14523
